full_text:
Ma Zhong 馬忠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Zhong (馬忠). Captured Guan Yu and Guan Ping. Executed to satiate Liu Bei in the novel. Ma Zhong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Ma Zhong lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
